title: Time tracking per tasks, per user
excerpt: I’m trying to make a dashboard on monday.com dev to see multiple columns (epics, tasks, assigned person) connected with a time tracking column to make a monthly report. Is this possible to do on the platform? If not, is …

posts.author: dmdmd (dmdmd)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to make a dashboard on monday.com dev to see multiple columns (epics, tasks, assigned person) connected with a time tracking column to make a monthly report. Is this possible to do on the platform? If not, is there a chance to add this feature to the existing time tracking widget? it seems to only show time tracking per one column.
